senses.gloss: faithful, true, truthful, authentic, honest, sincere, trusty, dependable

examples.english: which the trustworthy spirit ˹Gabriel˺ brought down

examples.text: وَلَمَّا دَنَا الْمَوْتُ لِلْمُصْطَفَىٰ / وَعِنْدَ الرَّحِيلِ يَنَالُ الْمُنَىٰ / أَتَاهُ الْأَمِينُ بِمِسْكِ الْخِتَامْ / أَلَا فَلْتُبَلِّغْ جَمِيعَ الْأَنَامِ / حُشُودٌ تَرَاءَتْ بِأَرْضِ الْغَدِيرِ
examples.english: And when death drew closer to the Chosen one (Prophet Muhammad) / And during the departure he receives the will (of God) / The Trustworthy has come to him with the sweet conclusion / You shall report (it) to all creatures / Crowds witnessing in the land of Ghadeer

senses.gloss: a male given name, Ameen or Amin

etymology.text: Related to أَمِنَ (ʔamina, “to be safe”), أَمُنَ (ʔamuna, “to be faithful”).
